name: Yunnan Jinggu Forestry Co.,Ltd
summary: Yunnan Jinggu Forestry Co.,Ltd engages in timber processing business in China and internationally. The company also manufactures and distributes forest chemical products. It offers gum rosin, gum turpentine oil, alpha-pinene, beta-pinene, wood boards, and other products. The company is also involved in forest cultivation, cutting, transportation, and processing of timbers, as well as the research and development of forest technology. Yunnan Jinggu Forestry Co.,Ltd is based in Puer, China.
